temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot reveals Chinese characters on a pixelated blue screen, with the characters '有內' (yǒu nèi) appearing first. The scene then cuts to a man in a dark suit and headphones, his face illuminated by the glow of his computer monitor, as he stares intently at the screen. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a character who is deeply focused on something on his computer, hinting at a high-stakes situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Urgent, commanding. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, rhythmic electronic score begins, accompanied by the sound of typing.)
(00:02-00:05) A rapid montage of quick cuts unfolds. First, a close-up of a hand frantically typing on a keyboard. This is followed by a shot of the man, still focused on his screen, and then another close-up of the screen showing the characters '网络交易' (wǎng lù jiāngyì) appearing. (Storyline: The montage builds suspense and urgency, suggesting the character is in the middle of a fast-paced, critical task, possibly hacking or writing something important.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense electronic score continues, punctuated by the rapid sounds of typing.)
